narrative:
Washington 4D (precinct in Fayette County) has 452 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
